---
title: "Exploratory Spaghetti Plots — Eye Liquid Spreading"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
    code_folding: show
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 6
    keep_md: true
---

<!-- To render this file from a PowerShell terminal:
  $env:RSTUDIO_PANDOC = "C:\Program Files\RStudio\resources\app\bin\quarto\bin\tools"
  & "C:\Program Files\R\R-4.5.2\bin\Rscript.exe" -e "rmarkdown::render('15_spaghetti_plots_R.Rmd')"
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  dpi = 150,
  fig.path = "15_spaghetti_plots_R_figures/"
)
```

# 1. Setup

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)

# Project-wide group colors (match Python notebooks 02/03 and 13_gamm_comparison_R.Rmd)
group_cols <- c(
  "CONTROL" = "#377EB8",
  "GLAUCOMA - URAMOX" = "#E41A1C",
  "GLAUCOMA + URAMOX" = "#4DAF4A"
)
group2_cols <- c("CONTROL" = "#377EB8", "GLAUCOMA" = "#E41A1C")

# Display labels for figures
LABEL_MAP <- c(
  "CONTROL"           = "Control",
  "GLAUCOMA - URAMOX" = "Glaucoma without oral acetazolamide",
  "GLAUCOMA + URAMOX" = "Glaucoma with oral acetazolamide",
  "GLAUCOMA"          = "Glaucoma"
)
```

```{r load-data}
df <- read_csv("results/eye_liquid_spread_measurements.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    group = factor(group, levels = c("CONTROL", "GLAUCOMA - URAMOX", "GLAUCOMA + URAMOX")),
    case  = factor(case)
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(group2 = factor(
    ifelse(group == "CONTROL", "CONTROL", "GLAUCOMA"),
    levels = c("CONTROL", "GLAUCOMA")
  ))
```

# 2. Exploratory Plots

```{r spaghetti-plot, fig.height=5}
ggplot(df, aes(x = time_sec, y = area_cm2, group = case, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = group_cols, labels = LABEL_MAP) +
  labs(
    x = "Time (s)",
    y = expression(Area ~ (cm^2)),
    colour = "Group",
    title = "Raw area curves by subject"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r spaghetti-faceted, fig.height=4}
facet_group_order <- c("CONTROL", "GLAUCOMA + URAMOX", "GLAUCOMA - URAMOX")
df_facet <- df %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = facet_group_order))

ggplot(df_facet, aes(x = time_sec, y = area_cm2, group = case, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~group, labeller = as_labeller(LABEL_MAP)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = group_cols, labels = LABEL_MAP) +
  labs(
    x = "Time (s)",
    y = expression(Area ~ (cm^2))
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r spaghetti-faceted-2group, fig.height=4}
ggplot(df, aes(x = time_sec, y = area_cm2, group = case, colour = group2)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~group2, labeller = as_labeller(LABEL_MAP)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = group2_cols, labels = LABEL_MAP) +
  labs(
    x = "Time (s)",
    y = expression(Area ~ (cm^2))
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
